top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%' 
  AND b.Name IN ('teacher', 'supporter');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%' 
  AND b.Name IN ('teacher', 'supporter');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id)  
FROM users u  
INNER JOIN badges b1 ON u.Id = b1.UserId AND b1.Name = 'teacher'  
INNER JOIN badges b2 ON u.Id = b2.UserId AND b2.Name = 'supporter'  
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) 
FROM users u
INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%' 
  AND b.Name IN ('teacher', 'supporter');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%' 
  AND b.Name IN ('teacher', 'supporter');

SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id  
    FROM users u  
    INNER JOIN badges b1 ON u.Id = b1.UserId AND b1.Name = 'teacher'  
    INNER JOIN badges b2 ON u.Id = b2.UserId AND b2.Name = 'supporter'  
    WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%'  
    GROUP BY u.Id  
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id)  
FROM users u  
INNER JOIN badges b1 ON u.Id = b1.UserId AND b1.Name = 'teacher'  
INNER JOIN badges b2 ON u.Id = b2.UserId AND b2.Name = 'supporter'  
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Location LIKE '%New York%' 
  AND b.Name IN ('teacher', 'supporter');
